name: No-Cook Tomato Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the diced tomatoes, chopped basil, shredded mozzarella, olive oil, grated Parmesan, salt, and pepper.
2. Meanwhile, cook the spaghetti in boiling salted water according to package directions.
3. Drain the pasta, reserving about 1/2 cup of the cooking liquid.
4. Add the drained pasta and reserved cooking liquid to the tomato mixture; toss to coat.
5. Serve immediately.
